scripts.preinstall: node -e "if(process.env.npm_config_user_agent && !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.startsWith('pnpm')){console.error('Error: please use pnpm instead of npm/yarn');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
